briefdescription.para: \par \b Purpose\/ \: Application entry point that initializes the Dedoc API server with configuration and logging, serving as the bootstrap for the entire document processing system.

detaileddescription.para: \par \b Scope\/ \: API server initialization, configuration bootstrapping. \par \b Input\/ \: None (environment variables and config files). \par \b Output\/ \: Running FastAPI server on configured port. \par \b Links\/ \: [USES_API(9): dedoc.api.dedoc_api.get_api, run_api; READS_DATA_FROM(8): Configuration.get_config] \par \b Invariants\/ \:

listitem.para: Configuration is always loaded before the API starts. \par \b Rationale\/ \:

detaileddescription.para: Q: Why is the entry point so minimal? A: All heavy initialization (readers, converters, extractors) is deferred to manager_config and DedocManager, keeping the bootstrap fast and testable. \par \b Changes\/ \:
LAST_CHANGE: [v1.0.0 – Added SEMANTIC TEMPLATE markup and LDD logging] \par \b Module Map\/ \:
FUNC 10[Application entry point] => main \par \b Use Cases\/ \:
